testcase.name: test_tc04_non_admin_access_restriction

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected access-denied alert at https://react-frontend-api-testing.vercel.app/login for non-admin user, but it was not shown. assert False + where False = <bound method UsersPage.is_access_denied_shown of <pages.users_page.UsersPage object at 0x000001EA95775090>>() + where <bound method UsersPage.is_access_denied_shown of <pages.users_page.UsersPage object at 0x000001EA95775090>> = <pages.users_page.UsersPage object at 0x000001EA95775090>.is_access_denied_shown

E assert False E + where False = <bound method UsersPage.is_access_denied_shown of <pages.users_page.UsersPage object at 0x000001EA95775090>>() E + where <bound method UsersPage.is_access_denied_shown of <pages.users_page.UsersPage object at 0x000001EA95775090>> = <pages.users_page.UsersPage object at 0x000001EA95775090>.is_access_denied_shown

testcase.name: test_tc01_valid_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Dashboard did not load after login. Current URL: https://react-frontend-api-testing.vercel.app/dashboard assert False + where False = <bound method DashboardPage.is_loaded of <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95775950>>() + where <bound method DashboardPage.is_loaded of <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95775950>> = <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95775950>.is_loaded

Current URL: https://react-frontend-api-testing.vercel.app/dashboard E assert False E + where False = <bound method DashboardPage.is_loaded of <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95775950>>() E + where <bound method DashboardPage.is_loaded of <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95775950>> = <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95775950>.is_loaded

testcase.name: test_tc08_iframe_and_window_handling

failure.message: TypeError: selenium.webdriver.remote.webdriver.WebDriver.find_element() argument after * must be an iterable, not type

testcase.failure: tests\test_browser_interactions.py:139: in test_tc08_iframe_and_window_handling assert page.is_displayed(page.wait.is_visible.__self__.__class__, pages\base_page.py:64: in is_displayed return self.wait.is_visible(locator, timeout) utils\wait_utils.py:102: in is_visible self.until_visible(locator, timeout) utils\wait_utils.py:39: in until_visible return self._wait(timeout).until( venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\wait.py:96: in until value = method(self._driver) venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\expected_conditions.py:156: in _predicate return _element_if_visible(driver.find_element(*locator)) E TypeError: selenium.webdriver.remote.webdriver.WebDriver.find_element() argument after * must be an iterable, not type

testcase.name: test_dashboard_logout

failure.message: AssertionError: Dashboard not loaded before logout assert False + where False = <bound method DashboardPage.is_loaded of <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95737A50>>() + where <bound method DashboardPage.is_loaded of <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95737A50>> = <pages.dashboard_page.DashboardPage object at 0x000001EA95737A50>.is_loaded

testcase.name: test_tc05_create_project
testcase.failure: tests\test_projects_tasks.py:48: in test_tc05_create_project projects.create_project(name, description) pages\projects_page.py:43: in create_project self.fill_project_form(name, description) pages\projects_page.py:26: in fill_project_form self.type_text(P.NAME_INPUT, name) pages\base_page.py:54: in type_text el = self.wait.until_visible(locator) utils\wait_utils.py:39: in until_visible return self._wait(timeout).until( venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\wait.py:105: in until raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: E Stacktrace: E #0 0x55f884a99e9a <unknown> E #1 0x55f88478345c <unknown> E #2 0x55f8847cf5b5 <unknown> E #3 0x55f8847cf671 <unknown> E #4 0x55f884813f14 <unknown> E #5 0x55f8847f24dd <unknown> E #6 0x55f8848112cc <unknown> E #7 0x55f8847f2253 <unknown> E #8 0x55f8847c21c7 <unknown> E #9 0x55f8847c2b3e <unknown> E #10 0x55f884a602db <unknown> E #11 0x55f884a64387 <unknown> E #12 0x55f884a4ce0e <unknown> E #13 0x55f884a64e52 <unknown> E #14 0x55f884a317af <unknown> E #15 0x55f884a89188 <unknown> E #16 0x55f884a8935b <unknown> E #17 0x55f884a98fcc <unknown> E #18 0x7f8a65690ac3 <unknown>

testcase.name: test_tc06_task_status_update

failure.message: AssertionError: Status after refresh 'API Automation Suite' does not match expected 'in_progress' assert ('in progress' in 'api automation suite' or 'in_progress' in 'api automation suite') + where 'in progress' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C60A70>('_', ' ') + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C60A70> = 'in_progress'.replace + where 'in_progress' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0> = 'in_progress'.lower + and 'api automation suite' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C603F0>('_', ' ') + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C603F0> = 'api automation suite'.replace + where 'api automation suite' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0> = 'API Automation Suite'.lower + and 'in_progress' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0> = 'in_progress'.lower + and 'api automation suite' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0> = 'API Automation Suite'.lower

testcase.failure: tests\test_projects_tasks.py:109: in test_tc06_task_status_update assert new_status.lower().replace("_", " ") in status_after_refresh.lower().replace("_", " ") \ E AssertionError: Status after refresh 'API Automation Suite' does not match expected 'in_progress' E assert ('in progress' in 'api automation suite' or 'in_progress' in 'api automation suite') E + where 'in progress' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C60A70>('_', ' ') E + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C60A70> = 'in_progress'.replace E + where 'in_progress' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0> = 'in_progress'.lower E + and 'api automation suite' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C603F0>('_', ' ') E + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0x000001EA95C603F0> = 'api automation suite'.replace E + where 'api automation suite' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0> = 'API Automation Suite'.lower E + and 'in_progress' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C61EF0> = 'in_progress'.lower E + and 'api automation suite' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001EA95C612B0> = 'API Automation Suite'.lower
